title: ericameria parryi var. nevadensis
intro: Ericameria parryi var. nevadensis, also known as Nevada goldenrod, is a shrub-like perennial plant that belongs to the sunflower family. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities, which can help soothe wounds and reduce pain. The plant's health benefits include its ability to support immune function, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as coughs and colds. Herbal preparations of Nevada goldenrod typically involve making a tea from its leaves and flowers, which can be used to treat various ailments, including digestive issues and skin conditions.
